name: Signature Collection
description: Our finest properties. Exceptional architecture, premium locations, and the highest level of service.

name: Family Friendly
description: Spacious properties with pools, gardens, and family-oriented amenities. Child-safe and parent-approved.

name: Couples Retreats
description: Intimate properties perfect for romantic getaways. Privacy, beauty, and thoughtful touches.

name: Group Celebrations
description: Large properties for milestone birthdays, reunions, and celebrations. Space for everyone.

name: Beachfront
description: Steps from the sand. Properties with direct beach access or ocean views.

name: Wine Country
description: Properties in or near vineyard regions. Perfect for wine lovers and harvest experiences.
